LSE-HS9-L4-1400P-HSSCIENG910-DBT-LAT-01 • HS Science: Engineering Design 9-10 • Engineering Design Trade-offs (Criteria vs Constraints)

The Bus Stop Bench

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What are the girl and boy disagreeing about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what each speaker prioritizes, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what each one says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what their disagreement is really about.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  HS-ETS1-1  |  HS Engineering Design 9-10: Criteria and Constraints
